title: bug: message_query missing sort parameter, last_msg_id could be non-chronological
description: load_messages_for_chat called message_query with sort:None. RFC 8620 §5.5: result order undefined without explicit sort. messages.last() used as auto-mark-read target could be wrong message. Fixed by hardcoding sort:[{property:sentAt,isAscending:true}] in message_query.
